items.claim: Damen Pinas has the power to finish the fight with a single strike.
items.quote: I think there's a chance Pinas just drops him in one shot, bro.

items.claim: Damen Pinas is a very strong puncher.
Conor McGregor is currently training with high discipline and living in the gym.
items.quote: he's been living in the gym and it looks like that's true.

items.claim: Dustin Poirier is a stylistically difficult matchup for Conor McGregor due to his southpaw stance.
items.quote: McGregor's struggles have been southballs, too. Porier is a hard match up for McGregor.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is exhibiting a positive, confident mindset similar to his younger career.
items.quote: This is the vibe of young McGregor. Like the confidence, he's brash, but it's also good energy, too.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's current fight is a 'must-win' scenario for his career.
items.quote: This is must win. This is it. Allah's here. It's over

items.claim: Conor McGregor successfully rattled Max Holloway mentally during the face-off.
items.quote: I think he kind of got in Max Holloway's head a little bit.
